svg.title: Unified Namespace MQTT topic tree
svg.desc: Hierarchical MQTT topic tree showing virtualfactory.proveit.services with Enterprise A, B, and C sub-namespaces, and expanded Enterprise C with device topics including tff and its sensor tags

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a Unified Namespace root node?')
sendPrompt('How does Enterprise C map to a UNS namespace?')
sendPrompt('How is the tff namespace structured in AnyLog UNS?')
